patch.value: NDJSON output mode: --format ndjson on list/search/context emits one JSON object per line for grep/jq/xargs pipelines

Line-oriented output child of the composability story: current json/toon/csv/table formats are document-shaped, so jq streaming and grep-per-item need awkward preprocessing. NDJSON is the standard pipeline interchange. Related: pm-cfed (lean JSON field shape) composes with this; pagination cursor work (pm-dfg0) shares ordering guarantees.

list/search/context accept --format ndjson emitting exactly one self-contained JSON object per line (no wrapper, no trailing summary on stdout); works with head/grep/jq -c round-trips and stays EPIPE-clean; field names identical to --json mode; contracts/MCP/completions/docs/completions regenerated; covered by unit + pipeline-style tests
